title: [request]Notification Automation Triggering on Time set in Date column
excerpt:

posts.author: MaxArceneaux (Max)
posts.cookedHtml:
How is it 2024 and we are still dependant on a static time value to trigger automations? This is the type of functionality that you shouldn’t have to consider asking about before signing up for a platform like Monday.
Sending emails for a specific time on a item-by-item basis seems like a pretty commonplace feature for any CRM on the market.
The cost/user has increased and we still have basic features like this, view reordering and html emails ‘on the backlog’.
I’m glad that I can have generative AI summarize my columns - that certainly adds value to my workflows and eases my day-to-day process

I’m frequently dissapointed in the feature prioritization of Monday’s product team
